block_00: 🎶It’s the most wonderful time of the year 🎶
block_03: In this wonderful season of joy and giving, we can't help but thank you for an amazing partnership. 🌟
block_04: Wishing you a Christmas filled with joy, laughter, and special moments with loved ones. May this holiday season bring you peace and prosperity.
block_05: As the year comes to a close, we’d like to ask you to share your opinion about our platform – Affstore. From functionality to offers – your opinion matters and we’re all ears! We’ll do our best to make your wishes come true this Christmas!
block_07: As the year comes to a close, we’d like to remind you that IQ Option Affiliate is closing and will be outsourced to a new platform – Affstore. If you haven’t started your move – please do so as soon as possible, to retain access to your entire statistics and account history (and to avoid being on Santa’s naughty list).
block_09: Cheers to a fantastic year together, and here's to even more success in the next one! 🎄✨
